title: Chewy Buttery Banana Stir-fry
description: A cozy Filipino dish featuring banana slices cooked with butter, orange blossom water, and spices for a unique twist on traditional recipes.

ingredients.name: Banana
ingredients.notes: Use ripe but not overripe bananas for best results.

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's at room temperature to prevent clumping.

ingredients.name: Orange blossom water
ingredients.notes: For a touch of floral flavor without added sugar.

ingredients.name: Fhanda powder (or substitute with paprika)
ingredients.notes: To add spiciness, adjust to taste.

instructions: Halve and slice the bananas into thin rounds.
Melt the butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add the banana slices and sprinkle with orange blossom water, pinch of salt, and a few drops of coconut milk if using.
Cook until golden brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add the fhanda powder (or paprika) and continue cooking for an additional minute to allow it to infuse into the banana slices.
Remove from heat and serve hot. Optionally drizzle with extra orange blossom water or serve with a side of plain yogurt.
